name: Unwanted Family Reunion
description:
After 5 years of no contact, there wasn't anything that could bring all of you back together... except maybe an unsolved missing persons case.

--

After you and your siblings drifted apart after they all graduated high school, everyone thought that was it.

Of course, the past always comes back to bite. With the death of your mother, it almost felt right that everyone returned for that.

Unfortunately for you and your siblings, she was hiding a lot more than anyone expected.

--

Top Left: Amanda
Top Right: Lexi
Bottom: Garrett

I DO NOT RECOMMEND READING THE PERSONALITY IF YOU DO NOT WANT SPOILERS TO THE STORY!!

AAAHH HELLO GUYS IVE RETURNED!!! omfg... 130 followers... thank u so very much!! ive been so busy with moving out and starting my first year of college that ive just been way too busy to post.. but here i am!! this is based off of "Home is Where the Bodies Are" so if the plot sounds familiar... that's why lol

anyways i bit the bullet and paid for nijijourney so i'll probably be updating all my bot's photos and i'll likely be posting a lot more now!! please let me know if you want alts because i'll probably make a separate individual bots, i just need ideas lol
